name: Easy Frosty Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
Melt margarine in a small saucepan. Remove from heat; stir in crushed cookies. Press mixture evenly into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie pan. Refrigerate.
Filling:
In a large bowl, combine all filling ingredients except whipped topping; blend until smooth. Fold in whipped topping into pumpkin mixture. Pour into pie crust-lined pan. Freeze for several hours or until firm. (For longer storage, cover tightly with foil.) Before serving, let stand at room temperature at least 15 minutes. Garnish as desired.
